content.en:
"It's so strong!"

The Qinghan Fairy was dumbfounded.

Even if you kill the poison dragon in one move, now you can easily kill all these true god-level creatures, which shows that Ye Tian's strength is completely above this group of true god-level creatures.

"No wonder one of my father's lords also has such a high opinion of His Highness Wanfa, I did underestimate this His Highness Wanfa from the Supreme Hall of the Human Race before!" said Fairy Qinghan secretly.

"Let's go, I'll help you pick the Flower of Eternity first, and then go collect the Rosewood and Golden Bone Leaves!"

Ye Tian said in a deep voice.

"Good!"

The Qinghan Fairy nodded.

The group set off and headed to somewhere in the Stygian Flower Realm.

Along the way, Ye Tian and the others encountered a lot of creatures, and rushed all the way over, no matter how powerful the creatures were, when they met Ye Tian, it was a dead end.

After about half a day, I finally arrived at my destination.

"This is it!"

The Qinghan Fairy pointed to a fragrant flower valley and said, "According to the information, the Eternal Flower grows here, it was not ripe at that time, and now it is about to ripen, we need to wait until it is ripe before picking the Eternal Flower!"

"Let's go inside!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The group walked into the valley, and Ye Tian used spatial perception and replication talent to keep checking the surrounding situation in case a powerful creature approached them.

"Huh......"

Ye Tian was suddenly slightly stunned, and his eyes looked into the depths of the valley.

"Be careful, this valley has a troublesome creature!"

Ye Tian said suddenly.

"Troublesome Creature !!"

When the Qinghan Fairy heard this, she was taken aback.

Before, the poisonous dragon and the creatures that were slightly stronger than the poisonous dragon were not looked at by Ye Tian, but now there are creatures here that make Ye Tian feel troublesome, how powerful this creature should be!

Immediately, the Qinghan Fairy and the group of guards approached Ye Tian, lest they be killed by that powerful creature in an instant.

"Your Highness Wanfa, what kind of creature is that, that makes you feel troublesome?"

Qinghan Fairy asked.

"A half-step god creature!"

Ye Tian said.

"What, a half-step god-level creature, how could a half-step god-level creature appear in the Stygian Flower Realm?"

Qinghan Fairy was surprised.

"The Stygian Flower Realm just doesn't allow the appearance of great god-level creatures, this half-step god-level creature is still a true god-level ninth-order, but the divine soul breath has reached the great god level, which is considered a half-step great god level, and its divine power has been compressed many times, it seems to have a special inheritance, otherwise it will definitely not compress the divine power. Plus, its talent should be very strong!"

Ye Tian explained.

The Qinghan Fairy now trusted Ye Tian's words very much, although he didn't know how Ye Tian judged that the half-step god-level creature was very powerful, but he didn't question Ye Tian.

In fact, Ye Tian was not exaggerating at all, by copying the talent, he had a complete insight into the talent of this creature.

Species: Devourer

Bloodline Talent: Universe level

Strength Talent: God

Speed Talent: God-level

Defense Talent: God-level

Devouring Talent: God-level

Dark Spear Talent: God-level

Healing Talent: God-level

......

In terms of talent, this devouring beast is very terrifying, if it were in the outside world, this devouring beast would have grown up long ago.

It's a pity that this devouring beast is in the Stygian Flower Realm, and it is suppressed by the Stygian Flower Realm, and in the end, it can only increase its strength to the half-step great god level, and it is difficult to continue to improve.

Otherwise, it would have become a powerful creature at the god level, galaxy level, or even the galaxy level or above.

"Devour talents, copy!"

Ye Tian easily copied the devouring talent of this devouring beast, this was a talent that he had never had, and when he saw it, he naturally wanted to copy it.

"Go in, as long as you don't leave my sensing range, I'll be enough to keep you!"

Ye Tian assured.

"That's a lot of dependence on His Highness Wanfa!"

His Royal Highness Qinghan said.

Immediately, the group entered the valley.

Soon, they came to a sea of flowers.

In the sea of flowers, a half-virtual and half-real flower is about to bloom, and the colorful fragrance spreads, as if enveloping the entire valley.

Moreover, this flower has a delicate and beautiful pattern, exuding a golden brilliance, showing a noble temperament.

It is the flower of eternity!

"It's it, the Flower of Eternity, and it looks like it will only bloom in a few years, plus our Danta's secret technique, it's enough to make it bloom early in a month!"

Qinghan Fairy said excitedly.

"That creature is still sleeping, Fairy Qinghan, you can catalyze this eternal flower first. Ye Tian urged.

He wasn't afraid of the creature, he just didn't have to fight.

If it was safe for the Qinghan Fairy to obtain the Flower of Eternity, why did he have to trouble the Devouring Beast?

"Okay!"

The Qinghan Fairy nodded.

In fact, she also sensed the oppressive aura in the underworld, which was definitely the aura of some very terrifying creature.

However, she didn't dare to use her divine sense to probe, so as not to disturb the other party.

Immediately.

The Qinghan Fairy arranged the formation and cast a secret technique, and began to catalyze the Flower of Eternity.

This kind of catalysis has no sequelae, and it is the secret of Danta.

In fact, Ye Tian also had a way to accelerate the growth of this eternal flower, that is, to use the talent of time, but the Qinghan Fairy had his own way, why should he help!

Time passed slowly, and the Flower of Eternity grew rapidly, getting closer and closer to the day of bloom.

During this time, Ye Tian was strolling in the valley, and unexpectedly found a few red sandalwood flowers, although it was too far from the required quantity, but it was also a harvest, not a waste of time.

Half a month later on this day.

Ye Tian felt that the devouring beast in the depths of the valley was about to wake up, and his breath began to permeate the entire valley.

The Qinghan Fairy trembled and said, "Your Highness Wanfa, has that creature woken up?"

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Rumble!!!

The sky suddenly darkened, and a dark aura enveloped the entire valley.

The Devourer is coming!

This valley can be regarded as the current territory of the Devouring Beast, and Ye Tian and the others are intruders to the Devouring Beast.

When encountering an intruder, the Devouring Beast was naturally furious.

Suddenly.

A huge black hole appeared in the sky, devouring everything.

The Qinghan Fairy and more than a dozen god-level guards seemed to be unable to stop their bodies and were about to be swallowed up by the black hole.

"Devouring Divine Power, and it is the Devouring Divine Power of the Consummation Realm!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Divine powers are already difficult to cultivate, in a place like the Stygian Flower Realm, this devouring beast can actually practice a devouring supernatural power, and also cultivate the devouring supernatural power to the consummation realm, is this really his own cultivation?

In terms of combat power, this devouring beast is definitely not weaker than an ordinary Son of the Universe, and it is equivalent to a true god-level Son of the Universe.

If it cultivates the Divine Codex, it may even hope to become a peak-level or even an eternal-level son of the universe.

The Qinghan Fairy and this group of guards are not even ants for this devouring beast, they are really too weak.

"Your Highness Wanfa, save me!"

The Qinghan Fairy panicked.

She felt that she couldn't resist the Devouring Beast at all, and even if she used the life-saving thing, she couldn't get rid of the Devouring Divine Power.

Then.

Ye Tian waved his hand and directly moved the Qinghan Fairy and the others to his side, and then slashed into the Devouring Divine Power with a single sword, directly breaking the Devouring Divine Power.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian opened all kinds of defensive means, and even the Divine Code Secret Technique Mixed Yuan Scale Armor was also cast, and it was almost full of power.

If the Devourer didn't know how to do it, he wouldn't care.

But this devouring beast not only has supernatural powers, but also devouring supernatural powers in the consummation realm, and its cultivation is also comparable to the great god level, such a devouring beast is also very good in other aspects, if he is not serious, although he will not be defeated, but it is easy to be exploited by the devouring beast and hurt the Qinghan fairy and others.

The Qinghan Fairy was too weak to withstand the devouring beast's casual blow.

Therefore, he must not give the Devourer the slightest chance.

"Five Elements Divine Wheel!"

"Space Confinement!"

"Time freezes!"

"Ten Thousand Realms!"

Several suppressive methods were unleashed in a row, causing the Devouring Beast to move slowly in an instant.

Taking advantage of this opportunity, Ye Tian unleashed a Hellish Divine Sky Spear and pierced through it fiercely.

Poof!

The Hell's Sky Spear stabbed into the Devourer's body, and then exploded inside the Devourer's body.

Although the Devouring Beast devoured part of the power of the Hell Divine Sky Spear in time, it was still seriously injured by the Hell Divine Sky Spear.

Then, Ye Tian continued to use the Heavenly Moon Knife Peerless Technique, and the Sword was seriously injured and devoured the beast.

However, the Devouring Beast's Devouring Talent can devour the surrounding vitality to restore injuries, which is a bit like the Bloodthirsty Talent, but it is even more terrifying than the Bloodthirsty Talent.

But even so, the Devouring Beast still couldn't recover from its injuries quickly, and it was difficult to stop Ye Tian's attack.

Soon, the Devouring Beast's aura began to wilt, and even fearful emotions developed.

"Human, I admit defeat, don't do it!"

The Devourer spoke.

"Admit defeat, you attack us first, why should I let you go?"

Ye Tian said.

"You came to my house and I attacked you!"

The Devourer argued.

"The weak eat the strong, you are weak, the dominance is in my hands, if there is no benefit, why should I let you go?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Boom Boom Boom !!

Under Ye Tian's attacks again and again, the devouring beast was on the verge of death, and he couldn't even escape.

Ye Tian has the talent of time and space, and the creatures that can escape even if they are weaker than Ye Tian are almost non-existent.

"Human, I have a great opportunity to tell you, and I am willing to recognize you as the Lord, don't kill me!"

The Devouring Beast confessed and hurriedly said.

Big chance?

As soon as he heard this, Ye Tian stopped attacking.

If other creatures said that there was a great chance, he might not believe it, but what the devouring beast said, he believed it very much.

Because if it weren't for the great chance, it would be impossible for this devouring beast to grow to this point in a place like the Stygian Flower Realm.

"Confess the Lord first!"

Ye Tian ordered.

Then, the Devouring Beast honestly completed the ceremony of recognizing the Lord and became Ye Tian's pet.

Not far away.

Qinghan Fairy and the others were dumbfounded, this change was too fast.

There was a life-and-death battle just now, and in the blink of an eye, such a terrifying creature as the Devouring Beast turned out to be Ye Tian's pet.

At this time, the Qinghan Fairy also had a basic judgment on Ye Tian's strength.

"It's too strong, Danta's strongest inheritance Daozi is far from being the opponent of His Highness Wanfa!"

The Qinghan Fairy said secretly.
